message:
fix: update flake version to 0.6.0 and make nix steps conditional

- Update flake.nix version from 0.4.0 to 0.6.0 to match current release
- Remove redundant SCRIPT_DIR re-declaration in bump-version.sh
- Make git add flake.nix conditional on nix being available (prevents
  failure when non-nix users run bump-version.sh --commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -182,7 +182,6 @@ main() {
             "version = \"$NEW_VERSION\""
 
         echo "  • flake.nix (vendorHash)"
-        SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
         if ! "$SCRIPT_DIR/update-nix-flake.sh"; then
             echo -e "${RED}Error: Failed to update vendorHash${NC}"
             exit 1
@@ -273,19 +272,26 @@ main() {
         echo "Creating git commit..."
 
         git add internal/cmd/version.go \
-                npm-package/package.json \
-                flake.nix
+                npm-package/package.json
+
+        if command -v nix &> /dev/null && [ -f "flake.nix" ]; then
+            git add flake.nix
+        fi
 
         if [ -f "CHANGELOG.md" ]; then
             git add CHANGELOG.md
         fi
 
+        local FLAKE_LINE=""
+        if command -v nix &> /dev/null; then
+            FLAKE_LINE=$'\n'"- flake.nix: $CURRENT_VERSION → $NEW_VERSION"
+        fi
+
         git commit -m "chore: Bump version to $NEW_VERSION
 
 Updated all component versions:
 - gt CLI: $CURRENT_VERSION → $NEW_VERSION
-- npm package: $CURRENT_VERSION → $NEW_VERSION
-- flake.nix: $CURRENT_VERSION → $NEW_VERSION
+- npm package: $CURRENT_VERSION → $NEW_VERSION${FLAKE_LINE}
 
 Generated by scripts/bump-version.sh"
